issue.title: Heartbeat refill lane 1247: remaining Python asset sweep 7/10

branch.latest_commit: tracked in git history after BIG-GO-1247 final sync

commands: for dir in src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts; do if [ -d "$dir" ]; then find "$dir" -name '*.py' -type f; fi; done

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1247 changes.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
The shared .symphony/workpad.md is durable enough for operator context, but the lane evidence of record lives in the BIG-GO-1247 report artifacts.
The lane stays scoped to zero-Python audit evidence and regression coverage because there are no remaining physical Python assets in this workspace.
